title: Ping Counter
description: Displays ping on HUD with adjustable position, size, color, and text.
body:
My attempt at a HUD ping display mod.

 ![Example display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6iJgkiJN/images/caf6f5efad1e77534a5bb3248086ddd0f3f789eb.png)

Appearance settings can be accessed via the button on the top left of the escape menu (only on 1.8.9), by the keybind (by default -), and by the command /pingcounter (1.21.x+).

![Settings Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6iJgkiJN/images/7786ae27bc9db6a8a786098c831596e486ac6c39.png)

In case the settings button (only on 1.8.9) overlaps with other mods, it is possible to turn it off by setting "hideSettingsButton", in the config file, to true.

In the displayed text, $[ping] is replaced with the ping to the server. Leaving the text box empty will revert it to default.


**Configs may change after updates.**

GitHub: https://github.com/EverTech1/PingCounter

Report issues here: https://github.com/EverTech1/PingCounter/issues

Contact email: evertech1mc@gmail.com
